title: Add retained RAM crash info infrastructure
description:
Add infrastructure for storing crash info in retained RAM that survives watchdog reset.

Implementation:
1. Add retained RAM section to linker script (board-specific)
2. Create crash_info struct:
   __retained static struct {
       uint32_t magic;      // Validity check
       uint32_t reason;     // Crash reason enum
       uint32_t location;   // __LINE__ or address
       uint32_t extra;      // Context-specific data
       uint32_t count;      // Crash count since power-on
   } crash_info;

3. Add store_crash_info() helper
4. On boot, check magic and log previous crash if valid
5. Clear after logging

Boards to support:
- STM32WL (olimex_lora_stm32wl_devkit)
- nRF52840 (future)

This enables post-mortem debugging without stopping the device.
close_reason: Fixed: Added retained RAM crash info infrastructure - crash_info.h/c with CRASH_MAGIC, store/check_and_clear functions; called early in main(); also fixed missing LICHEN Kconfig menuconfig entry and added top-level Kconfig
